query:
SELECT 
  v.id as videoId,
  v.scriptId,
  v.serviceId,
  v.userId,
  v.creditsUsed,
  vs.scenes,
  vs.voiceoverText,
  vs.videoType,
  vs.duration
FROM videos v
JOIN videoScripts vs ON v.scriptId = vs.id
WHERE v.id IN (250001, 250002, 250003, 250004, 250005)
ORDER BY v.id
LIMIT 1;

  v.scriptId,
  v.serviceId,

  v.creditsUsed,
  vs.scenes,
  vs.voiceoverText,

  vs.duration
FROM videos v
JOIN videoScripts vs ON v.scriptId = vs.id
WHERE v.id IN (250001, 250002, 250003, 250004, 250005)
